hero.headline: Turn Chores Into
hero.subHeadline: Help your kids build responsibility through a fun, game-inspired chore system. Assign tasks, earn points, and unlock amazing rewards.

features.title: Everything Your Family Needs
features.subtitle: A complete system to manage household chores and motivate your kids

assignChores.title: Assign Chores Easily
assignChores.description: Create and assign chores to each child with due dates, priorities, and recurring schedules.

earnPoints.title: Earn Chore Points
earnPoints.description: Kids earn points for every completed chore, building a sense of achievement and progress.

rewardSystem.title: Custom Reward System
rewardSystem.description: Set up rewards that matter to your kids — screen time, allowance, special treats, or outings.

progressTracking.title: Progress Tracking
progressTracking.description: Visual dashboards show each child's progress, completed tasks, and earned points at a glance.

streaks.title: Streaks & Milestones
streaks.description: Keep kids motivated with daily streaks, achievement badges, and milestone celebrations.

familyDashboard.title: Family Dashboard
familyDashboard.description: Manage all children from one central dashboard. See who's done what and who needs a reminder.

notifications.title: Smart Reminders
notifications.description: Gentle notifications remind kids of pending chores and celebrate their completions.

howItWorks.title: How ChoreTrack Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get your family started in minutes

step1.title: Parents Create Chores
step1.description: Set up chores with point values, due dates, and instructions. Assign them to specific kids or make them available to all.

step2.title: Kids Complete Tasks
step2.description: Children see their assigned chores in a fun, easy-to-use interface. They mark tasks complete when done.

step3.title: Earn Points
step3.description: Points are automatically added to each child's account when chores are completed and approved.

step4.title: Redeem Rewards
step4.description: Kids browse available rewards and redeem their hard-earned points for things they actually want.

rewards.title: Game-Inspired Motivation
rewards.subtitle: Keep kids engaged with a progression system designed for the real world

points.title: Chore Points
points.description: Every completed chore earns points that build up over time

streaks.title: Daily Streaks
streaks.description: Consecutive days of completing chores unlock streak bonuses

rewards.title: Unlockable Rewards
rewards.description: Custom rewards that kids actually want to work toward

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Achievement badges and level-ups celebrate big accomplishments

icecream.name: Get Ice Cream
icecream.description: Pick your favorite ice cream treat.

benefits.title: Why Parents Love ChoreTrack
benefits.subtitle: Less nagging, more doing — and a more responsible family

noNagging.title: Say Goodbye to Nagging
noNagging.description: Kids stay motivated by the reward system, reducing the need for constant reminders.

responsibility.title: Build Real Responsibility
responsibility.description: Kids learn that effort leads to rewards — a life skill that extends far beyond chores.

structure.title: Create Family Structure
structure.description: Consistent routines and clear expectations help the whole family run smoothly.

transparent.title: Transparent Rewards
transparent.description: Kids always know what they're working toward. No surprises, no disappointments.

management.title: Easy Family Management
management.description: Manage multiple children, multiple chores, and multiple reward levels from one simple dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple, Family-Friendly Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when your family is ready.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ChoreTrack

items.question: What age group is ChoreTrack designed for?
items.answer: ChoreTrack is designed for children ages 4–17. The interface adapts to be age-appropriate, with simpler visuals for younger kids and more detailed tracking for teens.

items.question: Can I create custom rewards?
items.answer: Absolutely! Parents can create any reward they want — screen time, allowance, special outings, treats, or anything else your kids love. You set the point values too.

items.question: Can multiple kids use the same family account?
items.answer: Yes! ChoreTrack is built for families. The free plan supports up to 2 children, and the Premium plan supports unlimited children under one family account.

items.question: Is there a free version?
items.answer: Yes! The free plan lets you add up to 2 children, create 10 chores, and set up a basic reward system — no credit card required.

items.question: How do kids access their chores?
items.answer: Kids log in with their own child-friendly profile (set up by parents). They can see their chores, mark them complete, and browse their rewards from any device.

items.question: Can I approve chores before points are awarded?
items.answer: Yes. Parents can enable 'approval mode' which requires them to verify a chore before points are added to the child's account.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Family's Routine?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of families who've made chores fun and rewarding. Get started for free today.
